entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, staking, and liquidity incentives across Polygon and Aurora deployments.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Greenhouse as a sustainable multi-chain DEX built on Polygon and live on Aurora, with dedicated swap, farm, pool, and staking surfaces. The official application domain remains reachable.

evidence.title: Greenhouse documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Greenhouse as a multi-chain decentralized exchange on Polygon and Aurora and documents trading fees, swap functionality, farms, pools, staking, and multi-chain operation.

evidence.title: Greenhouse official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application domain remains reachable and is linked from the official Greenhouse documentation as the Polygon deployment entry point.

evidence.title: Greenhouse exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies Greenhouse under the greenhousedex.com domain and corroborates the first-party DEX identity.
